display_name: PATIENT-SLOT A/B (green-day winner decode 2026-06-29). IDENTICAL entry to the firing baseline badday_flush_nf15 (unique_buyers>=12, recurring>=1, liq>=15k, pc_h1<=-20, net_flow_15s>=0) so this isolates ONE lever bundle: relax the 3-slot cap (->12) + extend hold (no time-box, never_runner/slow_bleed only cut LOSERS) + UNCAP the winner (sell 25% at TP1 not 75%, ride 50% on a WIDE 12pp trail). KEEPS the tight loss cuts the decode says are our edge (badday_ -7 in-flight floor, hard_stop -12, fast_bail -9, pre_stop_bail -3, ng_faststop -4). Tests the winner-decode thesis: winners aren't a different ENTRY, they hold many positions and let winners RUN with tight cuts. PAPER ONLY (live_probe=false). Distinct from patient_sleeve (which NEVER fired - its winner_select_entry FAIL-CLOSED + microcap starved it) and from #486 exit-giveback (which tests peak-armed giveback on the EXISTING tight ladder). Retire by enabled=false.
